scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/shared build && bun run --cwd packages/ganko build && bun run --cwd packages/lsp build && bun run --cwd packages/vscode build
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/ganko test && bun run --cwd packages/lsp test
scripts.tsc: bun run --cwd packages/shared tsc && bun run --cwd packages/ganko tsc && bun run --cwd packages/lsp tsc && bun run --cwd packages/vscode tsc
scripts.ci: bun run tsc && bun run build && bun run lint && bun run test && bun run --cwd packages/ganko generate:check
scripts.clean: bun -e "import { readdir, rm } from 'node:fs/promises'; import { resolve } from 'node:path'; const root = process.cwd(); const entries = await readdir(resolve(root, 'packages'), { withFileTypes: true }); for (const entry of entries) { if (!entry.isDirectory()) continue; await rm(resolve(root, 'packages', entry.name, 'dist'), { recursive: true, force: true }); }"
scripts.rebuild: bun run clean && bun install && bun run build
scripts.package: bun run build && bun run --cwd packages/vscode package
